title: Local entrepreneurs invited to pitch their ideas
description: GEORGE NEWS - Entrepreneurs from the Garden...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Entrepreneurs from the Garden Route have a chance to showcase their innovative ideas in front of an audience, and stand a chance to win amazing prizes that can accelerate their business.

Muzi FM, the Garden Route's first IsiXhosa radio station, is hosting an entrepreneurship innovation and pitching competition and is inviting entrepreneurs to celebrate the success of Garden Route entrepreneurs, themed 'Our new heritage'.


> Whether you are an informal trader or operate a registered business, you can register for a free stall and display your products and services, and/or, register for the pitching competition and stand a chance to win.


"This year's initiative is a pilot, and we are looking at doing this yearly in various towns within the Garden Route," says Siyamthanda Johns, Muzi FM managing director.

Use the links below to the competition and stall registration:

Registration Link to the Elevator Pitch CompetitionRegistration Link to the Pop-Up Stall

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
